results.rendered_html:
pari-√pat P. -patati (3. pl. pf. -petur), to fly or run about, wheel or whirl round, rush to and fro, move hither and thither,  RV.  &c. &c.;
to leap down from (abl.),  MBh. ;
to throw one's self upon, attack (with loc.),  ib. ;  Kāv.  :
Caus. -pātayati, to cause to fall down, shoot down or off,  MBh. ;
to throw into (loc.),  Mṛcch. ;
to destroy,  Divyāv.

results.rendered_html:
paripat 1 P.
1 To fly round or about, wheel or whirl round, hover about; biṃdūtkṣepān pipāsuḥ paripatati śikhī bhrāṃtimadvāriyaṃtraṃ  M. 2. 13 ;  Amaru. 48. 
2 To spring down upon, attack, fall upon (as in battle).
3 To run in all directions; (hayāḥ) paripeturdiśo daśa  Mb. 
4 To go to or fall into;  Śi. 11. 41. 
— Caus. To shoot off or down.
